page_metadata.biotools__summary: ProPores2 is a web service and stand-alone tool for identifying, manipulating, and visualizing pores in protein structures. ProPores2 is a C++ command line tool for analysing pores (and cavities) in proteins. It provides three components that can be run together or individually.
